message:
fix(web): properly distinguish self vs external scroll/zoom updates

Root cause: The sync effects were firing on every scroll/zoom update
and calling scrollToPosition/setRendererZoomScale, even for our own
updates. This caused:
1. scrollToPosition defaults to center=true, jumping back toward start
2. Constant re-application of scroll position causing jank/tearing

Fix:
- Track what WE set via lastScrollWeSetRef and lastZoomWeSetRef
- In handleVisibleRangeChange/handleZoomChange, record our value BEFORE
  updating the store
- In sync effects, skip if store value matches what we just set
- Only apply truly EXTERNAL updates (gene map clicks, collaboration)

This ensures normal user scrolling flows: renderer → store → skip sync
While external updates flow: external source → store → apply to renderer

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
